description_long: This is a vintage-style coupe car with a predominantly olive green body, accented by black fenders and gold trim. The vehicle features a classic open-top design with a single row of seating, a large steering wheel, and a visible dashboard. The wheels are spoked and gold-colored, with a spare tire mounted on the rear deck. The front end is characterized by two round headlights, a mesh grille, and a pair of cylindrical engine covers. The car's side panels display subtle rivet detailing and a small storage box on the passenger side. The overall design evokes early 20th-century automobiles, with a utilitarian yet elegant appearance suitable for urban or historical settings.
description: A vintage open-top coupe car with an olive green body, gold spoked wheels, and black fenders, featuring a spare tire on the rear and classic round headlights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the olive green body, gold spoked wheels, spare tire on the rear, and a small storage box on the passenger side.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the spare tire mounted on the back deck, the open seating area, and the symmetrical rear fenders.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the car's open cockpit, gold wheels, and the absence of the storage box seen on the other side.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the mesh grille, two round headlights, and the open-top cockpit with a visible steering wheel.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
